title: World Geography
description: Question batch for the Continents and Regions domain.

questions.question: Which continent is the largest by land area?
questions.explanation: Asia is the largest continent.

questions.question: Which continent is the smallest by land area?
questions.explanation: Australia is the smallest continent.

questions.question: Which continent has the most countries?
questions.explanation: Africa has the highest number of sovereign states.

questions.question: Which continent includes the Sahara Desert?
questions.explanation: The Sahara is in North Africa.

questions.question: Which continent is home to Brazil?
questions.explanation: Brazil is in South America.

questions.question: Which continent contains India?
questions.explanation: India is in Asia.

questions.question: Which continent is mostly covered by ice?
questions.explanation: Antarctica is largely ice-covered.

questions.question: Which region includes countries like Saudi Arabia and Jordan?
questions.explanation: Saudi Arabia and Jordan are in the Middle East.

questions.question: Which region includes Norway, Sweden, and Denmark?
questions.explanation: These countries are part of Scandinavia.

questions.question: Which continent is the United States in?
questions.explanation: The United States is in North America.

questions.question: Which region lies south of the Sahara?
questions.explanation: Sub-Saharan Africa is south of the Sahara.

questions.question: Which region stretches between Europe and Asia near the Black Sea?
questions.explanation: The Caucasus lies between Europe and Asia.

questions.question: Which region includes Guatemala and Costa Rica?
questions.explanation: Both countries are in Central America.

questions.question: Which region includes Argentina and Chile's far south?
questions.explanation: Patagonia covers southern Argentina and Chile.

questions.question: Which region is made up of many islands in the Pacific?
questions.explanation: Oceania includes Australia, New Zealand, and Pacific islands.

questions.question: Which region includes Morocco, Algeria, and Tunisia?
questions.explanation: These North African countries are in the Maghreb.

questions.question: Which region includes Poland, Hungary, and Romania?
questions.explanation: These countries are part of Eastern Europe.

questions.question: Which region includes Thailand, Vietnam, and Indonesia?
questions.explanation: These countries are in Southeast Asia.

questions.question: Which region borders the southern edge of the Sahara?
questions.explanation: The Sahel is the semi-arid belt south of the Sahara.

questions.question: Which region includes Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania?
questions.explanation: These countries are the Baltic states.

questions.question: Why is Eurasia sometimes treated as one landmass?
answers: Europe and Asia are connected physically
questions.explanation: Europe and Asia form one continuous landmass.

questions.question: What best defines a geographic region?
answers: A place with one city only
questions.explanation: Regions group places by shared physical or human traits.

questions.question: Why is the Middle East geopolitically important?
answers: It links continents and energy routes
questions.explanation: Its location and resources make it strategically important.

questions.question: Why is Southeast Asia important for trade?
answers: Major sea lanes pass through it
questions.explanation: Critical shipping routes cross Southeast Asia.

questions.question: Which region is known for fjords and northern climates?
questions.explanation: Scandinavia is known for fjords and cold northern landscapes.

questions.question: Why is the Sahel vulnerable to hardship?
questions.explanation: The Sahel often faces drought and land degradation.

questions.question: Which region is split between Europe and Asia politically and physically?
questions.explanation: The Caucasus sits between Europe and Asia.

questions.question: What makes Oceania distinct?
answers: It has one giant desert only
questions.explanation: Oceania includes Australia and many Pacific islands.

questions.question: Why is Antarctica unique among continents?
answers: It has no permanent sovereign state population
It has the world's largest rainforest
questions.explanation: Antarctica has no permanent native population or sovereign country.

questions.question: Which region includes Spain and Portugal?
questions.explanation: Spain and Portugal are on the Iberian Peninsula.
